tools.name: inpi_get_trademark
tools.description: Look up an INPI trademark by registration number (consultar una marca por acta) (registration number, e.g. '3792456'). Returns the full record or null if not found.

tools.name: inpi_search_trademark
tools.description: Search INPI trademarks by name (buscar marcas registradas en INPI), case-insensitive substring. Returns the matching registrations with their Nice class, status (presentada/publicada/oposicion/concedi
